# CWE-140 positive: delimiter injection in CSV export (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-140-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"fmt"
	"net/http"
	"strings"
)

// CWE-140 Improper Neutralization of Delimiters
// Vulnerable line: comma-separated row built by naive concatenation.
func BuildMemberCSV(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	if r.Method != http.MethodGet {
		http.Error(w, "method", http.StatusMethodNotAllowed)
		return
	}
	display := r.URL.Query().Get("display")
	dept := r.URL.Query().Get("dept")
	if display == "" || dept == "" {
		http.Error(w, "missing", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	line := strings.Join([]string{display, dept, "active"}, ",")
	csv := fmt.Sprintf("display,dept,status\n%s", line)
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "text/csv")
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	_, _ = w.Write([]byte(csv))
}
